content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1602: Evil clone!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Hitesh_

Hovering between the five deep blue stars, Fan De Lei wore a cold face. Jets of light shot from his hands as he was gathering energy, waiting for Shi Yan. Bands of starlight poured from the five stars like streams, pouring into his chest.

He had been here for a long time, and had fused the energy of the Star Power Upanishad Origin, which had rocketed his god power and his body, making him quite intimidating!

His Soul Consciousness had been ameliorated as well. He had a wonderful feeling as if he was blending with this galaxy.

At the moment Shi Yan entered the sea of stars, he could see Shi Yan’s energy, Sea of Consciousness, and even the soul pond clearly. He knew all of Shi Yan’s clone’s stats.

He was so surprised when he recognized that no matter it was Shi Yan’s physique, God power, or soul, it wasn’t really intimidating-Shi Yan wasn’t as strong as the time he was in the Phantom Clan’s territory.

Fan De Lei was discreetly frightened, but then got cheered up. He thought that Shi Yan had problems with his cultivation or was wounded in a battle.

He didn’t know that it was just a clone.

Although Shi Yan’s power was strong and his realm was high, after the first cloning in which he had divided his Devouring power Upanishad and the eight evil powers, his body was weakened. After this current cloning, he had spent his Star power Upanishad to the clone, and his overall power was reduced one more time. Of course, he wasn’t as strong as he used to be.

Unfortunately, his real body couldn’t intrude the Power Upanishad Origin, and could only watch from the outside.

“Compared to my imagination, you’re much weaker. Excellent! My chance’s coming...” Fan De Lei was so excited that his body quivered. He moved out of a group of stars while brilliant starlight sprinkled on him, entering his body and making him shining in a mysterious way.

Being a member of the Phantom Clan, he was really good-looking and carried a natural poise. Under the beautiful starlight, he floated while smiling charmingly.

“The Skyfall Star River belongs to me. I’d been searching the Cloud Mist Territory for so many years for it. Shouldn’t you return the Skyfall Star River to its rightful owner?”

Smiling tenderly, he pointed at the divine weapon which was now in the form of a chain of stars, hovering above Shi Yan’s head. Starlight suddenly sparkled on his palm, which made the lines in his palms seem like the trajectory of the stars. Slowly, a massive star map arose from his palm.

That star map had a part of mysterious energy from the Power Upanishad Origin. It was the energy he had exerted a lot of efforts to create lately.

The mysterious, immense star map arose as an illusion, slowly snatching toward the Skyfall Star River’s star chain. The Absolute Beginning divine weapon that had fused with Shi Yan’s soul shook hard. It seemed to want to join that star map, becoming part of the Star Power Upanishad Origin.

“Dare to vie with me?” Shi Yan was surprised. He scrutinized Fan De Lei, shaking his head with an indifferent sigh. “I had agreed with Montecie and Mei Ji that I wouldn’t come and trouble you. Because you are a member of the Phantom Clan, for the growth of the clan, they had implored me not to kill you.”

Pausing for a while, his eyes went cold. “You and Cantecie didn’t have good fortune, indeed. It’s your fate to... die! Devour swallowed Cantecie in his black hole form, who has turned into ashes. I watched her die...And you, I didn’t want to attack you, but you wanted to stay and trouble me. I can only say sorry to Montecie and Mei Ji.

“Stop!”

While hissing, Shi Yan touched his glabella and a mass of stars emerged above his head, where the stars rolled and arrayed in the form of an imposing bear. The star bear was actually the power of constellation. It pounded its chest and roared, starlight sparking everywhere.

The sparking starlight beams created many fading shadows, entering the Skyfall Star River with Shi Yan’s soul energy.

Although this clone had only a part of Shi Yan’s God power, blood, power Upanishad, and soul, and it looked weak, it actually had the realm of the host body-the Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm!

Fan Dei Lei was only at the First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm!

Perhaps the clone and Fan De Lei were equally strong, but in terms of the realm and the deep knowledge of Star power Upanishad, no matter how hard Fan Dei Lei tried, he would never catch up with Shi Yan.

The Skyfall Star River halted as Shi Yan called it!

The giant star bear roared and howled, passing the Skyfall Star River and furiously dashing toward Fan De Lei. In Fan De Lei’s eyes, the sea of stars in front of him caved in as it was attacked by the angry roar. Shockwaves struck his soul altar instantly, leaving him mentally collapsed.

He then saw the stars in the sky fall, swallowing him entirely!

As this Star Power Upanishad Origin was really vast, and each planet in it had an immense power, Fan De Lei, at his realm, would need a lot of time to absorb this sea of stars.

Actually, he had found this place very early, but the fusion process wasn’t smooth. He couldn’t refine much star energy, anyway; he had just linked his soul with these five planets.

However, when Shi Yan began to use his Star power Upanishad and the Skyfall Star River to create the giant bear with the constellation power, the stars in the sky were like open eyes, all staring at him!

Just like that, millions of starlight beams congregated.

In this moment, Shi Yan had become the focus of the starlights. It seemed he had established a strong connection with each star in the sky!

Each Power Upanishad Origin had a core operation rule: it would proactively choose the fittest one to fuse with!

Creatures at high realm always had deep understanding of the Power Upanishad, which made them easy to get the approval from the Power Upanishad Origin. This situation was the same when Desolate got into Hiro’s gold mountain, and Yuan got Emperor Sea Shark’s water drop.

Desolate had a higher realm than Hiro. After so many years, his understanding of the Metal power Upanishad had become exquisite. As soon as he got in there, he got the power to expel Hiro!

Similarly, Yuan had dedicated his entire body to practice the Water Power Upanishad. He could be deemed the ancestor of Water Power Upanishad. As soon as he got into that water drop, the Water Power Upanishad Origin could feel the familiar aura, so it initially wanted to fuse with Yuan and evict Emperor Sea Shark, who had arrived there first.

The Power Upanishad Origin didn’t care who came first. It only appreciated the high realm and profound and thorough knowledge of the Power Upanishad.

Desolate and Yuan came later, but with their deep knowledge of the Power Upanishad and the realm at the Peak of Territory Ancestor Realm, they could obtain the approval of the Power Upanishad Origin, making the Power Upanishad Origin choose them proactively.

And now, since Fan De Lei was only at the First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, although he was here for a long time, his fusion was very difficult.

All was because of his low realm...

Although he was just a clone with the Star power Upanishad, Shi Yan still had the Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. Moreover, he came with a divine weapon with the star attribute. As soon as he urged the Star power Upanishad, the Star Power Upanishad Origin here was stimulated.

Starlight fell from the sky: the Star Power Upanishad Origin had a new decision.

...No doubt that Fan De Lei would be the poor, expelled one this time.

By the time he got a hold of himself from the star attack, he found the connection he had tried very hard to establish with the five planets was cut off.

The giant star bear came bellowing and roaring as it brutally tore his territory. The Skyfall Star River now had new star power, coming forcefully with the power that could erase the seal.

Fan De Lei lifted his head, his face ash-gray and hopeless. His spirit was defeated, and he didn’t have anything to resist with. He was predestined to fail, all because of his low realm.

“AHHHH!”

...

A savage soul tornado arose and dashed through the tunnel of the Devouring Power Upanishad Origin. Devour had gathered his evil power, using his abundant soul energy to come.

BOOM!

The endless negative emotions and evil powers came in unceasing waves, washing his soul and body.

At that moment, the savage Devour halted, thrilled!

He had finally reached the part of the tunnel where negative energies hadn’t been completely refined! It meant Shi Yan wasn’t far from here!

Devour changed, turning into nine shadows which carried the Devouring power and the eight evil powers respectively. He relaxed and the nine shadows frantically took in the remnant of negative energies in the tunnel.

Meanwhile, Shi Yan’s clone jutted his head out of a deeper section of the tunnel.

Devour had finally found Shi Yan. At this moment, this clone of Shi Yan that was focusing on taking in the evil energy opened his eyes. This evil clone had a pair of blood-red eyes, his face savage and crazy. Evil energy twirled around him unceasingly.

At first glance, Devour was shocked!

“Damn! How much evil energy has he absorbed?”

Shi Yan was now more terrifying than his host body, Devour thought. This evil clone of Shi Yan had entered the source of all evilness in this world. Seven hundred and twenty acupuncture points in his body had connected with all major territories in the world, which had gathered all the evil energies and thoughts in innumerable creatures living there.

Crazily taking in without a limit, this evil clone was filled with ruthless, hot-tempered, bloodthirsty, and intimidating feelings. The thick evil, murderous aura from him could represent all the negative thoughts and will of creatures in this world. He was now the God of Evil that had intimidated even Devour.

“I’ve been waiting for you for a long, long time...”

This evil body licked his lips heartlessly. From his crimson eyes, two trickles of blood dropped, which gave him a fearsome look!

The trickles of blood had a terrifying erosive power that immediately left two horrible wounds on his handsome, sculpted face. The two wounds were deep to his bone, making his face seem terrifying and savage.

“RRROOOAAAARRR!”

It seemed that all creatures in the world heard this destructive roar echo deep in their souls! All the evil energies in the dark tunnel rose, gathering on Shi Yan’s clone.

At this moment, this clone was even more terrifying and intimidating than the real body!

Peerless intimidation!
